features: Brand: 12 Months Supply Cetirizine Hayfever and Allergy Tablets 30 x 12
12 Months Supply Cetirizine Hayfever and Allergy Tablets 30 x 12
Alleviates sneezing, itchy eyes, runny nose, and skin rashes
Suitable for adults and children over 6 years old
description: Product description Cetirizine Hayfever and Allergy Tablets offer effective, long-lasting relief from the symptoms of hayfever and seasonal allergies. Each tablet contains 10mg of cetirizine, an antihistamine that provides relief from sneezing, itchy eyes, runny nose, and skin rashes. This pack includes a 12-month supply with 360 tablets (30 tablets x 12), providing a convenient and cost-effective solution for year-round allergy management. Directions Always Take Cetirizine Tablets Exactly As Your Doctor Or Pharmacist Has Told You To Do So. You Should Check With Your Doctor Or Pharmacist If You Are Not Sure. Dosage The Usual Dosage Is: Adults, Elderly And Children Over 12 Years: Take One Tablet (10 Mg) Once Daily. Children Aged 6-12 Years: Take Half A Tablet (5 Mg) Twice Daily (Morning And Evening). Children Weighing Less Than 30 Kg: Haifa Tablet (5 Mg) Should Be Taken Once Daily. Patients With Moderate To Severe Renal Impairment: Patients With Moderate Or Severe Renal Impairment Are Recommended To Take 5 Mg Once Daily. If Drowsiness Occurs, Your Tablet Can Be Taken In The Evening
